articles.title: Kalshi, Polymarket open interest falls 20% as World Cup frenzy winds down
articles.summary: Sports accounted for 80% of both Kalshi and Polymarket's total volumes throughout the weekslong World Cup tournament.

articles.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
articles.summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

articles.title: SEC sues Mining Automatic and founder over alleged $22M crypto mining scheme
articles.summary: The SEC alleges Mining Automatic and its founder raised $22 million from investors by promising guaranteed crypto mining returns while spending only a fraction of the funds on mining operations.

articles.title: Trump’s crypto ethics stance leaves Clarity Act negotiations in limbo
articles.summary: A meeting last week to discuss an ethics provision to address President Trump's vast crypto wealth has become something of a black box.

articles.title: Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn 
Metaplanet subsidiary Bitcoin Japan is starting a crypto treasury. 
This post Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Japan Announces Plan to Scoop Up Coins Despite Market Downturn  first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
articles.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

articles.title: Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September
Capital B will execute a 10-for-1 reverse stock split in September as the Paris-listed bitcoin treasury company looks to attract more institutional investors while continuing to build its 3,139 BTC reserve.
This post Bitcoin-Treasury Capital B Plans 10-for-1 Reverse Stock Split for September first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Vietnam sets new crypto trading fines on par with drunk-driving penalties
articles.summary: Domestic investors who trade crypto without going through a licensed service provider face fines of roughly $1,140 to $1,900.

articles.title: Exodus to cut 25% of staff in company reorganization
articles.summary: The wallet company said it expected the layoffs to generate between $10 million and $13 million in savings as part of its strategy to build a full-stack card issuance and payments platform.

articles.title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
articles.summary: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

articles.title: Coinbase Executive Says Clarity Act Has ‘Tremendous Momentum’ in the Senate
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Coinbase Executive Says Clarity Act Has ‘Tremendous Momentum’ in the Senate
Coinbase's Ryan VanGrack said the Clarity Act is gaining strong Senate momentum and argued it would bring long-awaited federal rules, stronger consumer protections, and regulatory clarity to the crypto industry.
This post Coinbase Executive Says Clarity Act Has ‘Tremendous Momentum’ in the Senate first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: AI-assisted hacking is outpacing traditional code reviews, NEAR co-founder says
articles.summary: NEAR co-founder Polosukhin called formal verification a necessary shift for securing blockchain code from AI hacking.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
articles.summary: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.

articles.title: Russia Moves to Rein In Crypto Fraud With New Legislation
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Russia Moves to Rein In Crypto Fraud With New Legislation
Russia is pushing ahead with regulating the cryptocurrency market, with the State Duma considering a bill on combating fraud in the industry, according to reports.  The bill will look at “combating the illegal use of cryptocurrencies within our country,” Anatoly Aksakov, chairman of the State Duma Committee on Financial Markets, reportedly said. Lawmakers will vote […]

articles.title: Hut 8, IREN deals lift AI-focused Bitcoin mining stocks
articles.summary: Bitcoin miners rallied as investors cheered multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure contracts, underscoring the sector’s accelerating shift toward data centers and cloud computing.

articles.title: Former NY Governor Cuomo joins OKX board, touts 24/7 tokenized trading
articles.summary: Andrew Cuomo said OKX could help bring round-the-clock trading and more international capital into U.S. markets.

articles.title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
articles.summary: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

articles.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
articles.summary: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

articles.title: New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak
Onramp argues that spot bitcoin offers stronger long-term value than paper bitcoin exposure, highlighting bitcoin's fixed supply as its price trades roughly 50% below its all-time high.
This post New Onramp Report Makes the Case for Spot Bitcoin Over Paper Claims as Price Sits at Half Its Peak first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
articles.summary: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

articles.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
articles.summary: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

articles.title: Bitcoin price hits $65K wall as stocks battle ‘record’ institutional tech sell-off
articles.summary: Bitcoin faced troublesome resistance at $65,000 while traders still saw a potential BTC price breakout into a “bullish market structure.”

articles.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
articles.summary: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.

articles.title: Benchmark backs Exodus after 25% workforce cut, says stablecoin pivot is being overlooked
articles.summary: Late Friday afternoon, Exodus said it expects the restructuring to generate $10 million to $13 million in annualized cost savings.

articles.title: Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million
Strive (ASST) bought 21 bitcoin for about $1.3 million last week, increasing its treasury to 19,921 BTC while cash reserves rose to $157.4 million, according to a Monday SEC filing.
This post Strive (ASST) Adds 21 Bitcoin as Treasury Reaches 19,921 BTC and Cash Climbs to $157 Million first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy sold $263.5 million in MSTR shares last week without buying bitcoin, raising its U.S. dollar reserve to a record $3.225 billion while maintaining its 843,775 BTC treasury and continuing its recent shift toward cash accumulation.

articles.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
articles.summary: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

articles.title: Strategy sells $263.5 million in MSTR shares, buys no bitcoin as USD reserve tops $3.2 billion
articles.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for around 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth roughly $54.7 billion.

articles.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
articles.summary: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

articles.summary: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.
